prompt: Original premium game health heart icon concept. Smooth symmetrical red heart with subtle inward-curving top lobes, combining elegant JRPG emblem language with very clear classic game-health readability. Centered single icon only.
style: premium game UI icon design, polished, clean silhouette, smooth curvature, restrained gloss
composition: single centered icon, straight-on, isolated asset
lighting: soft internal glow, subtle edge highlights, dark neutral presentation
palette: rich crimson reds with soft scarlet highlights, optional faint silver trim
materials: painted enamel or polished game icon surface, not glass, not gemstone
constraints: original design, no text, no letters, no crown, no weapon, no anatomy, no character, no full HUD frame, transparent background
negative: pixel art, retro sprite look, gore, anatomical heart, cartoon mascot, clutter, busy background
